calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-15-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, September 15, 2016.
Ender Darya dba R Pro Auto, Appellant/Defendant was not present.
Luis Rafael Montoya, Respondent/Plaintiff was present, in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on calendar as assigned by Department 206 for trial de novo.

Respondent/Plaintiff Luis Rafael Montoya was sworn in and testifies on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing. Appeal Dismissed, appeal untimely filed per CCP Rules 116.750 (b).

Judge Pro Tem: Diana Kruze. Clerk: P. Natt. matter not reported (D525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Judgment Entered
